docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GUINTO, MACARIO VIRAY AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRILL, SERGIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUINTO, MACARIO VIRAY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-14-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRILL, SERGIO
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BECERRILL, SERGIO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GUINTO, MACARIO VIRAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CERTIFIED INTERPRETER TAGALOG KARENINA CASTRO PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUINTO, MACARIO VIRAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BECERRILL, SERGIO ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE A CLAIM FOR A RENT ADJUSTMENT DUE TO DIMINISHED SERVICES, PLAINTIFF APPARENTLY IS A SUB TENANT AND NOT A PARTY TO THE MASTER RENTAL AGREEMENT. THIS CLAIM SHOULD BE ASSERTED AGAINST HIS SUB-LESSOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BECERRILL, SERGIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GUINTO, MACARIO VIRAY THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT SERGIO GUINTO WAS INDIVIDUALLY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ALLEGED INTERFERENCE WITH REPAIRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GUINTO, MACARIO VIRAY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
